description: Local-first MCP sidecar for Markdown artifacts, review cards, and supervised knowledge growth.
name: io.github.Semiotronika/LINZA-MCP

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Markdown workspace or vault LINZA may index.
environmentVariables.name: LINZA_VAULT

environmentVariables.description: Embedding provider. Allowed values: lmstudio, openai, ollama. Default: lmstudio.
environmentVariables.name: LINZA_EMBED_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: Embedding API base URL when LINZA_EMBED_PROVIDER is lmstudio, openai, or ollama.
environmentVariables.name: LINZA_EMBED_URL

environmentVariables.description: Semantic bridge threshold as a floating-point string. Default: 0.55.
environmentVariables.name: LINZA_BRIDGE_THRESHOLD

environmentVariables.description: Maximum note pairs for semantic bridge rebuilds. Default: 1000000. Use 0 to disable the guard.
environmentVariables.name: LINZA_MAX_BRIDGE_PAIRS

environmentVariables.description: Default search profile name. Defaults to general.
environmentVariables.name: LINZA_DEFAULT_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Tool surface. Allowed values: default, advanced. Default: default.
environmentVariables.name: LINZA_TOOL_SURFACE

environmentVariables.description: Human-facing guide language. Allowed values: auto, en, ru. Default: auto.
environmentVariables.name: LINZA_LANGUAGE

title: LINZA
